plan_name: API handlers and router: all 16 HTTP endpoints

tasks.name: Task 1: Health, sessions list/detail, and session sub-resource handlers
tasks.notes: health.rs has 1 handler (HealthResponse with db_size, record_count, version, status). sessions.rs has 6 handlers (list, detail, conversation, tree, agents, summary). All compile as valid axum handlers with State<SharedState>, Path, and Query extractors.

tasks.name: Task 2: Messages, search handlers, and partial router construction
tasks.notes: messages.rs has 2 handlers (query POST with Json<MessageQuery>, by_uuid GET). search.rs has 1 handler with empty-query validation returning 400. mod.rs has build_router with 10 routes registered using axum 0.8 path syntax ({id} not :id). Placeholder comment for Plan 3 additions.

decisions.decision: Used axum 0.8 path parameter syntax ({id}) instead of the older :id style — axum 0.8 requires curly-brace syntax for path parameters
search handler validates non-empty q parameter and returns ApiError::BadRequest(400) for blank queries, which also exercises the previously-unused BadRequest variant
